category_sources: source_facts.description says automated code formatter for Erlang; official README calls erlfmt an opinionated Erlang code formatter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is erlfmt; official GitHub repository is WhatsApp/erlfmt.
docs_sources: Official README contains usage, design principles, and links to repository doc files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/WhatsApp/erlfmt; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes erlfmt as an Erlang formatter with rebar3 and escript usage; source_facts.executables lists erlfmt.
